# SBDC URL Catalog for BOSS Routing

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

- SBA local assistance SBDC search for 77084: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/find?type=26&zip=77084 - SBA Houston District resource partners page 1: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/district?district=35 - SBA Houston District resource partners page 2: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/district?district=35&page=1

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, disaster readiness during Validation, Growth, Recovery and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
